title: archon-setup baseline profiles
description: Named onboarding tiers (lane C2, #352). Each profile lists a closure-complete resolved feature set; --profile <id> resolves to features[] (unioned with any --features extras). Deliberately within the zero-dep validator's supported keyword subset (no `default`) so it is machine-validated at load time, unlike features' schema.json.

features.description: Dotted feature ids (must exist in features.json). Closure-complete: the profile's `requires` closure should equal this list.
